selected_topic: Russia's missile and drone attacks on Ukraine
news_angle: Turn this verified current news event into a funny Hunk Mao visual metaphor scene: Russia launched a new wave of missile and drone attacks on Kyiv and Ukraine, killing at least 22 people.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao is standing on a rooftop in a cityscape styled as a stylized cat playground. In the foreground, Hunk Mao wears a cool black hoodie with a playful mischievous grin, holding a giant toy slingshot shaped like a missile launcher. Behind him, multiple flying 'missile-shaped' mechanical toy drones zoom toward a startled group of oversized stylized mouse-shaped drones trying to shield a tiny colorful cat village labeled 'Kyiv.' The sky is dusk-toned with soft pastel explosions shaped like comic-style 'POW!' clouds to keep it light yet impactful. Smoke curls in fluffy whimsical clouds. In the background, silhouettes of other cats and mouse toys peek from behind buildings, symbolizing civilians watching anxiously. The scene shows active motion: Hunk Mao's ready stance, whizzing projectiles, and the tension of the playful but serious toy battle.
image_prompt: Square Instagram illustration of Hunk Mao, the youthful, athletic orange tabby cat with strong tabby markings and a mischievous confident grin, standing on a rooftop in a stylized city playground. He wears a black hoodie and holds a large toy slingshot missile launcher. Flying around are colorful missile-shaped mechanical toy drones aimed at mouse-shaped drones trying to protect a tiny cat village labeled 'Kyiv.' The dusk sky is filled with fluffy comic-style pastel explosion clouds, with playful smoke. In the far background, shadowy cats and mouse toys watch nervously from behind stylized buildings. The composition has clear foreground (Hunk Mao), midground (toy drones in action), and background (watching silhouettes). The tone is funny yet serious, no gore or cruelty, lots of internet-culture style urban energy in the art.
easter_eggs: The tiny cat village marked 'Kyiv' with small flag icons shaped as paws.
One drone has a tiny black hoodie imitation to match Hunk Mao's style.
A miniature cheese-shaped missile 'ammo' tray near Hunk Mao's feet.
Shadow cats in the background wearing various tiny hats representing diverse civilians.
A street sign in cat language with playful jabs like 'No Mouse Zone.'
A ticking cat clock on the rooftop, symbolizing urgency.
Fluffy smoke shaped subtly like a peace sign.
A toy drone stuck in a giant yarn ball to show failed attack.
An alley cat holding a 'Stay Safe' banner in graffiti style.
Hunk Mao’s slingshot has a tiny chain necklace charm shaped like a paw.
caption: Russia launched a new wave of missile and drone attacks on Kyiv and Ukraine, killing at least 22 people. Even in chaos, I’m still the cat ready to sling some truth your way.
risk_notes: Sensitive wartime content but highly relevant and newsworthy.
